use_cases: Primary action trigger in forms and UI
Icon-only buttons for toolbars and actions
Multi-size button system for consistent visual hierarchy
Accessible button component with focus management
ai_summary: A flexible, accessible button component built on Base UI with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Features 10 size variants including icon-only sizes, responsive touch-friendly sizing with pointer-coarse media queries, and full keyboard accessibility with focus-visible ring styling. Includes icon handling with automatic sizing and opacity, disabled states with reduced opacity, and rounded corners with CSS custom property tokens. Designed as a core building block for SaaS and developer tool interfaces.
